title: Fit test - Disconnecting earbuds during Fit Test
scenario: Fit Test does not properly handle earbud disconnection during test on Poly Bluetooth earbuds
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app with earbuds connected.
Navigate to App Settings → Onboarding / User Guides → Fit Test.
Tap to start the Fit Test.
During the test, disconnect one earbud by placing it in the charging case and closing the lid (for applicable models).
Observe the Fit Test results screen.
Turn on both earbuds and tap Retry.
During the second Fit Test, disconnect both earbuds by placing them in the charging case.
Observe the Fit Test results screen.
expected: 1) Disconnected earbud becomes greyed out with a yellow icon and \"Fail\" tag; connected earbud shows proper icon and tag based on test results; text \"The {right/left} earbud was disconnected during the fit test\" is displayed. 2) Both earbuds become greyed out with yellow icon and \"Fail\" tag; text \"The earbuds were disconnected during the fit test\" is displayed.
